name: sign-safe-skill
description: Signing-time safety gate for Solana transactions: decode, classify danger primitives, compute signer outflow, and emit a SIGN/HOLD/REJECT verdict. Offline, deterministic, tested.
author: Raffx <rafinha-lima1@live.com> (https://github.com/lrafasouza)
comment:dependencies: The deterministic core (skill/src/) imports NOTHING external. @solana/web3.js and @solana/kit are dev-only: used by fixture generation, the standalone runner, and the dual-reference cross-validation tests. Keeping them out of runtime dependencies is intentional and is asserted by the no-network test.
